title: All'armi siam fascisti!
director: Lino Del Fra, Cecilia Mangini, Lino Miccichè
writer: Franco Fortini, Lino Del Fra, Cecilia Mangini
actors: Giancarlo Sbragia, Emilio Cigoli, Nando Gazzolo
plot: Documentary compiled from archives and accompanied by a poet's commentary, shows the sweep of modern Italian history from 191 to 1961, centering on the conditions leading to Fascism and the post WW II reaction to the Fascist exper...
